message: The full staged-patch advisor pass identified that plan path extraction skipped extensionless repo paths such as Dockerfile, Makefile and scripts/deploy. This could falsely mark planned extensionless changes as out-of-scope and block the release gate.
resolution: extractPathScopesFromPlanText now captures quoted/backticked repo paths without requiring a dot, while filtering obvious non-path tokens. Smoke test 4 covers Dockerfile and scripts/deploy.
